productDisplayName: Timberland Men Dark Brown Casual Shoes
description: Slip into laidback comfort with these timberland shoes. Coming from timberland, these shoes feature an upper crafted from leather with stitch detailing for extra style. UpperTwo-tone leather upper with mesh inserts on the side for added strength, durability and breathabilityPadded tongue and collar to protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blisteringElasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feetBrand logo embedded on the sideMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioningOutsoleTPU outsole with waffle patterned grooves and a curved midfootOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe to act as a toe guardshoe careUse a leather brush to dust off the dirtUse a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shineDo not store in direct sunlight
